# Feel Fully You

> Juliette Karaman teaches The Touch Reset — a body-based method for couples and individuals whose intimacy has gone quiet, showing that disconnection is a nervous-system pattern the body learned for safety, not a character flaw or a failing relationship. Her work spans trauma, touch, and the threshold between the two.

Juliette Karaman has worked with couples and trauma for 15 years. Her method, The Touch Reset, treats disconnection, low desire, and touch-avoidance as intelligent protective patterns the body developed — not brokenness. Work happens through three doors: Touch Point (men, £97/mo membership), The Room (women, £3,000 cohort), and The Beginning (couples, £8,997).

## Essays

- [Why Desire Went Quiet — The Body Does Not Open on Command](https://feelfullyyou.com/essays/the-body-does-not-open-on-command.html): why intimacy without felt safety and consent teaches the body to shut down, and what restores it.
- [What the Body Was Told — Body Shame as Inherited Instruction](https://feelfullyyou.com/essays/what-the-body-was-told.html): why the body holds onto weight and shame as a protective, learned response to unsafety — not a malfunction.
- [Why the Spark Dies in Relationships](https://feelfullyyou.com/essays/why-the-spark-dies.html)
- [Why I Separate Them — When Couples Therapy Doesn't Hold](https://feelfullyyou.com/essays/why-i-separate-them.html)
- [It Isn't All Yours — How the Body Inherits Trauma](https://feelfullyyou.com/essays/it-isnt-all-yours.html)
- [The Body Still Reaches — Missing Touch After Separation](https://feelfullyyou.com/essays/the-body-still-reaches.html)
- [What the Body Knows When It Finally Feels Held](https://feelfullyyou.com/essays/when-it-finally-feels-held.html)
- [Out Loud — How the Body Holds Abuse and Finds Its Voice](https://feelfullyyou.com/essays/out-loud.html)
- [Why She Tenses When You Touch Her](https://feelfullyyou.com/essays/she-tightened-you-pulled-back.html)
- [What Her Body Is Telling You — Three Signals Men Miss](https://feelfullyyou.com/essays/what-her-body-is-telling-you.html)
- [Dear Men Who Love Women — The Map Nobody Gave You](https://feelfullyyou.com/essays/dear-men-who-love-women.html)
- [Make Sure He Comes — On Women Who Cannot Receive](https://feelfullyyou.com/essays/make-sure-he-comes.html)

- [Couples Therapy Didn't Work. What Now?](https://feelfullyyou.com/questions/couples-therapy-didnt-work.html)

- [How to Rebuild Trust With Your Wife or Partner](https://feelfullyyou.com/questions/how-to-rebuild-her-trust.html)
- [How to Ask for More Intimacy Without It Going Wrong](https://feelfullyyou.com/questions/how-to-ask-for-more-intimacy.html)
- [She Says She's Fine But Her Body Says Otherwise](https://feelfullyyou.com/questions/she-says-shes-fine.html)
- [Why Can I Feel It With Someone Else, But Not the Man I Love?](https://feelfullyyou.com/questions/why-can-i-feel-it-with-someone-else.html)
- [What Are the Touch Languages™?](https://feelfullyyou.com/questions/what-are-the-touch-languages.html)
- [Every Conversation Ends in Silence: How to Talk Again](https://feelfullyyou.com/questions/every-conversation-ends-in-silence.html)
